cn.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

# Support & Legal #
For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact:
Customer Support:
suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com

Privacy Policy:
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy

End User License Agreement (EULA):
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula

【v.3.5.10 更新公告】

*推荐各位细胞人使用云存档功能备份存档~避免卸载原安装包后出现存档丢失的情况。

**各位细胞人大佬注意！随着游戏的更新以及资源量的提高，设备的最低运行配置要求会有所提升，推荐使用有可用RAM 4GB 以上的设备来运行本次的新内容哦。

 

以下为本次更新内容：

-修复了击败国王之手后发生的撞车事故

-修复了与女王仆人作战时灯塔中的软锁

-修复了女王与以太门战斗期间的空访问崩溃

-修复了读/写保存时的崩溃（包括播放按钮）

-修复了自定义游戏中的随机头部功能

-当无法访问IAP模块时，在DLC菜单上添加了一条错误消息

-改进并统一了选项菜单中的选择和滚动行为

-修复了“选项”滚动条在点击时出现错误的问题

-修复了紫花园大桥过场后HUD调光不正确的问题

-当强制设置为默认值时，玩家现在可以隐藏noBlood选项

-网格选择器UI现在相对于标题垂直居中

-修复了日语中损坏/缺失的字符

-修复了中文中损坏/缺失的字符

-更新了“一路向海DLC”捆绑包内容（包含了所有4个DLC）及商店位置
 

 

最低设备要求：iOS 12 或更高版本，内存：4GB，RAM：4GB

注意：部分系统在游戏过程中可能会出现运行内存报错弹框的问题，烦请细胞人们备份云存档，尝试重启游戏，再次进入游戏即可正常游玩~

同时在切换设备，或者重装游戏的时候，本地的存档会随着卸载丢失，推荐大家使用云存档功能来进行游戏进度的备份~请注意，云存档的目的是解决换机和数据备份的需求，上传及下载操作不可逆，且均需要手动操作。
cn.description:
死亡并非永眠。

操作炼金实验失败的产物，在杀戮与重生的反复轮回中探索一座房间不断变化的巨大城堡，解开这座阴暗孤岛上的秘密…!
当然，前提是你能战胜镇守其中的诸多守卫。

重生细胞是一款RogueVania类型的平台动作游戏。你需要在一次一次战斗中锤炼战斗技巧，精通拥有独特使用方式的各种武器，并且将翻滚和闪避等走位操作视为本能，以逃过那些出其不意出现的怪潮侵袭，迎战强横凶残的守卫和Boss。

鏖战、死亡、重生、再战

继PC与主机平台之后，《重生细胞》准备在移动平台开启战斗！

【主要特色】
• RogueVania: 逐步攻略经过悉心设计的相连关卡，体验rogue-lite类型的重复可玩性，直面肾上腺素激增的凶险场面。
• 凌厉爽快的2D动作体验：洞悉敌人的出手套路灵活走位，否则你将止步于半途，无缘城堡中隐藏的更多秘密。
• 非线性进程：在反复的死亡中突破难关，根据自己的游玩风格或心情自由选择装备与技能搭配。厌倦了臭气熏天的下水道？攀上城头呼吸新鲜的空气吧！
• 随心所欲的游玩：探索城堡的边边角角和隐秘通道，发现深藏在城堡深处的迷人景观，抑或是直冲终点？一切由你。

【针对移动平台进行的悉心优化】
• 两种攻击模式：传统与移动版新加入的自动攻击系统。
• 定制键位与触屏操作：根据你的喜好调整按钮位置及大小，通过触屏滑动来进行闪避走位…
• MFi设备以及主机控制器蓝牙连接特性支持。

cn.description:
===铁皮公司正版授权===

比以往任何时候都更具威胁和力量，王国保卫战5 带来了一种全新、令人兴奋的体验，以其前作的快节奏和引人入胜的玩法为基础，赢得了奖项的赞誉。

当一个强大的邪恶势力在王国上空出现时，一个意想不到的联盟形成了——发动终极塔防战役，用两支军队中最精锐的力量来保卫整个王国和领域！虽然他们暂时并肩作战，但临时联盟内部典型的纷争可能会改变后续冒险的走向。

准备好释放双英雄的强大力量，在塔防战斗中扭转战局吧！
没错，现在你可以同时控制两条龙！双倍的喷火乐趣，双倍的混乱——只要确保他们不会因为谁能囤积更多的金子争吵！

所有重量级角色如圣骑士、弓箭手、法师、死灵法师等等都听你指挥。但要注意，他们可能会开始争论谁是队伍中的真正英雄，而敌人却悄悄溜过去！ 
你准备好迎接终极对决了吗？和利尼维亚的勇敢战士们以及不屈不挠的黑暗军团，踏上征服一个巨大敌人的史诗旅程。  

游戏特色：
招募34名独特的英雄和防御塔！

- 18个精英防御塔的建造和升级
骑士顶在最前方、弓箭手百步穿杨、法师的奥术魔法、死灵法师的亡灵之力，甚至还有能召唤恶魔的深渊祭坛！——这些经典强力塔都将听从你的号令！

- 16个史诗英雄 - 将塔防战斗提升到新的水平
同时控制2名英雄去战斗！
准备见证最不可能的双英雄组合的强大威力！森林守护灵搭配钢铁傀儡？
时空法师携手“普通勇士”？看似离奇的搭档，也能爆发惊人威力！

- 6种不同地形，更有迷人的战场等你征服
保卫Kingdom Rush的多彩景观。穿越王国深林，甚至其危险的洞穴作战。

- 25个充满快节奏塔防战斗的战役阶段
在充满惊喜挑战和细节的异国地形中设定你的策略。
面对成群的不可预测的敌人和史诗般的boss战斗，将你的防御策略推向极限！

- 3种不同的游戏模式来测试你的实力
在取得胜利后，尝试以更具挑战性的方式玩每个阶段。谁不喜欢一个好的挑战呢？

- 58多个游戏成就在战斗中征服
没有诱人的奖励，史诗策略游戏算什么？展示你的技能，解锁奖励！

- 45种以上不同的敌人来测试你的塔防智慧
展现联盟的塔防战斗技能，对抗4个不同的敌人氏族。用独特的防御策略击败他们每一个！

- 当然…
有很多复活节彩蛋和Ironhide Game Studio一贯的轻松幽默。
因为没有一些隐藏的惊喜，策略游戏算什么呢？

“一卷《天下英雄谱》横空出世，列尽武林风流人物”，天下英雄谱之“黑榜”：朔海派教主“丁老怪”、黑沙寨寨主“崔振炀”、十二连环坞当家“鹰眼老七”等黑榜高手登场：

cn.description:
【核心特色：这就是你从未体验过的江湖】

1.  “移动端发货”：独属于你的无缝武侠大世界，真实武林画卷
       无读条世界：告别加载画面！我们打造了一个面积达256丈的无缝大世界——中原、江南、西域、南疆……从熙熙攘攘的古城街区，到人迹罕至的雪山秘境，所有场景皆可自由探索。
       活的江湖：昼夜、真实天气、万物动态（可破坏环境、可拾取万物）。世界不仅仅是背景，更是可交互的阶段。
       无束缚体验：轻功飞跃山河，踏波而行，攀爬峭壁。你的武侠梦，不再受束缚。

（我们的核心是创造一个‘无界’的武侠世界。在这里，地图没有空气墙，探索没有读条，整个世界是连贯、可交互、充满生机的）

2.  “第一代最受欢迎的玩法”：千种武学心法，自由搭配的武侠战斗
       没有僵化的“职业”限制！我们提供了超过数百种内功、外功、轻功、技艺。你可以是刀剑双绝的豪侠，也可以是精通音律、以琴音伤人的雅士，甚至是暗器毒术无双的“邪派”高手。
       武学招式不再是一成不变的关键循环。采用我们“无规则”战斗系统，所有的招式心苦自由搭配、组合，你自己的套路。是追求一击必杀的极限爆发，还是决定组建全场连绵不绝的控制？战斗的策略与乐趣，完全交由你。

3.  “你的江湖”：高自由度的人生，你的选择就是规则
       江湖不是非黑即白。你的每一个抉择都会引发难以想象的“因果链”。救下一个路人，他可能就是你未来宗门的引荐人；偷听一桩秘密，或许会让你卷入颠覆王朝的阴谋。
       可以选择拜入名门正派的恪守门规，也可以加入诡谲魔教随心所欲，更可以做个散人，逍遥自在。甚至可以完全抛开打杀，成为一名富甲天下的商贾、巧夺天工的匠人，也可以悬壶济世的神医。这个世界，认可你的每一种活法。

4.  “多达700万字的文本内容，庞大的玩法量级”：沙盒奇遇，要素隐藏线索
       《下一站江湖Ⅱ》的世界是“活”的。NPC们有自己的生活记录和喜怒哀乐。你可能在悬崖下发现前辈遗骸，学到失传绝学；也可能一碗酒，结交到一位隐世高人。
       大量未在任务列表中标记的“奇遇”事件散落在世界各个角落。探索的回报远超你的想象，真正的宝藏，永远献给最好奇的旅人。

5.  “市井百业，多维度沉浸身份”：技艺百态，感受江湖的烟火气
       江湖不止有武功。我们深入嵌入了当今同类生活技能：采矿、采药、锻造、制琴、象棋、书法、绘画、厨艺……这些不仅仅是赚钱的手段，更是提升角色、解锁特殊剧情和关卡能力的关键。一门技艺的技能，也能让你名动江湖。

【故事背景：游戏基础框架】（持续更新）
700万文字庞大世界观：战国末期，三国、百家、江湖！

1.  角色扮演：
① 多出身多结局，每个主角都是全新体验（当前已将门之子、富家千金、寒门书生、江湖浪子、无名小卒等五大身出300多万字主线剧情接近20个结局）

2.  市井身份：
① 皈依各器皿特色的城井身份独特的对应独立剧情、规则玩法。比如刺客对应青衣楼的门玩法派、以及相关的物品万字独立剧情，突出的悬赏及刺杀玩法等

3.  江湖霸图：模拟经营、骑砍LIKE、世界建造
① 物品可加入各具特色的门派
② 每个派都有自己的独立剧情以及与其他门派的恩怨，比如狂刀门和绝剑门的火烧凌云窟大型剧情
③ 每个门派都有自己突出的突出体系，以及规则：比如少林的从扫地僧至罗汉堂首座，敲钟玩法及铜人阵
④ 每个门派都强调自己的武学、心法体系
⑤ 每个门派都可以模拟经营、占领大世界的比如矿山青楼，并开启对应的经营
⑥ 每个门派都一样骑马与砍杀一样的世界争霸

4.  自由成长：习百家武学，走你自己的江湖

cn.description:
Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ；
你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。

你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。

「Card.Note」九大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.全局手势化
下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。

5.语音录入
打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

6.要事提醒：
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

7.快捷高效
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

8.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

9.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

hk.description:
Airport ground maneuvering simulation of more than 40 different airports including 
London Heathrow LHR, Philadelphia PHL, Miami Intl. MIA, Singapore, New York JFK, Las Vegas LAS, São Paulo GRU, Montreal YUL, Boston BOS,  and many more. 

Different versions of airports included:
- Play the simplified version, where the airport is scaled down to an easy playable experience.
- Play the real thing. Here the whole airport is in real size displayed, where all your skills are required.

Features
- Give pushback, taxi, holding and take-off clearances. 
- Handle emergencies and try to release all flights on time in order to release the next level.

From an easy single-runway operation at the beginning to demanding hub airports with multiple active runways where all your skills are required.

《Halls of Torment》是一款生存遊戲，畫面採用預先渲染的復古風，類似於1990年代晚期的角色扮演遊戲。從多名英雄角色中選擇一名操控，並進入致命的苦痛殿堂闖蕩。對抗不潔的恐怖生物，並在敵人一波波的攻勢下努力求生，直到其中一位苦痛領主登場。使用角色特長、技能和物品強化英雄。在闖關過程中打造全新強力流派。探索地底的各個地方，尋找全新強力物品，讓你能夠闖入更黑暗的深淵。

2023年Steam年度最佳肉鸽遊戲Halls of Torment現已上線移動端，快來加入這場90年代復古風格ARPG的生存挑戰吧！

◆ 解鎖各個職業的力量，並和你指定的角色結合
◆ 找到稀有版本的物品，進一步優化你的流派配置

hk.description:
Atomic Space Age was a blast! Until it became the Post-Apocalyptic Space Age.

Your space station is about to explode and you only have 60 seconds before things get messy. What (or who) will you grab before you make a mad dash for the emergency shuttle and begin your journey into THE GREAT UNKNOWN?

This is 60 Parsecs!, a dark comedy sci-fi adventure set in the Atomic Space Age - complete with all the Cold War paranoia, chrome-plated wall accents and cockroaches with space helmets.

Lead a crew of woefully unprepared astronauts, equipped with whatever junk - sorry - "supplies" you can grab before blasting off, on a journey across the cosmos that's best described as misguided. Make the best of it, while dealing with soup shortages and other horrors of outer space. Will you have what it takes to find a new home and survive?

Bon voyage!


SCAVENGE & EVACUATE
With only 60 seconds before nukes reduce the space station to floating particles in the vacuum of space, frantically grab whatever supplies and crew you can before getting out of there. You never know when that sock puppet will come in handy.

SURVIVE & DECIDE
Space funerals are inconvenient, so try to avoid dying where possible. Use your limited supplies and (hopefully not limited) wits to make difficult choices and ensure your survival, even though the odds are definitely stacked against you.

EXPLORE & CRAFT
Duct tape fixes all problems, but how do you fix (or at least craft) duct tape? Chart expeditions to find resources, craft survival essentials and explore strange new worlds in a procedural, very-much-permadeath adventure.

LEAD & PROTECT
As captain, it's your duty to keep the crew happy - they're less likely to kill you that way. Manage relationships as you watch them grow closer and hopefully not throw each other out the airlock.

hk.description:
Dolores, Ted, Mary Jane and Timmy return to face the nuclear apocalypse in this new, remastered edition of the classic atomic adventure - 60 Seconds! Reatomized, featuring high resolution art support, refreshed 2D graphics and hand-drawn 3D textures, new interactive menu, improved UI system, a technical refresh, and of course... new content!

NEW GAMEPLAY MODE
Survival Challenges - unique, short storylines which will put your survival skills to the test!

NEW OPPORTUNITIES
to escape the wasteland in form of a storyline spanning across multiple playthroughs! Can you escape the wasteland in style?

NEW RELATIONSHIP SYSTEM
more stories and crazy interactions between the McDoodle family members!

NEW SOUNDS, ART AND UNLOCKABLE VISUAL CONTENT
allowing you to add a little color to your fallout shelter!

NEW ACHIEVEMENTS!

With only 60 seconds left to impact, go on a mad dash through the house in search of family members and useful supplies. Everything will be against you: time, your very own furniture, a house that's different every time you play, and the fundamental question... what to take with you and who to leave behind?

Reaching the fallout shelter in time, alive, is only the beginning. Whatever you scavenged and whoever you saved will play a vital role in your survival. Each survival story will be different, with every day surprising you with unexpected events. Will all of these stories end well? It's up to you. Ration food and water, make best use of your supplies, face difficult choices and even venture into the wasteland.

Good luck.

hk.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

hk.description:
Death is not the end.

Play as a failed alchemic experiment and explore the sprawling, ever-changing castle to find out what happened on this gloomy island…! 
That is, assuming you’re able to fight your way past its keepers.

Dead Cells is a roguevania action platformer that will require you to master frantic 2D combat with a wide variety of weapons and skills against merciless minions and boss.

Kill. Die. Learn. Repeat.

First available on PC and consoles, the indie hit Dead Cells is now slaying foes on mobile!

Main Features
• Roguevania: The progressive exploration of an interconnected world, with the replayability of a rogue-lite and the adrenaline-pumping threat of permadeath

• Frantic and Dynamic 2D Action: Learn your enemies’ patterns to stay alive, or prepare to be sent back to your cell before you can say “baguette”

• Nonlinear Progression: Unlock new levels with every death, opt for the path that suits your current build, your playstyle or just your mood. 
Surely, the ramparts can’t be as bad as the sewers, right?

• Play at your own pace: Will you explore every nook and cranny of the castle, or rush to the end?

*Latest updates are available: Clean Cut & The End is Near*

RETURN TO CASTLEVANIA DLC
Time for some vampire slaying
• New storyline - overcome the Ruler of Darkness alongside Alucard and Richter Belmont,
• 2 new biomes - Explore Dracula's Castle and its outskirts
• 9 new monsters - Werewolves, haunted armors, and medusas are waiting for you
• 14 new weapons - wield the Vampire Killer or the Holy Water to defeat creatures of the night,
• 3 new bosses - go fangs to fangs against Death and Dracula himself
• 20 new outfits - dress as your favorite Castlevania characters such as Simon and Richter Belmont or Alucard
• Alternative soundtracks - play along 51 Castlevania original tracks and 12 tunes reimagined in the style of Dead Cells

THE BAD SEED DLC
You reap what you sow
• New levels to lose your head in the not-so-peaceful Dilapidated Arboretum and the noxious Morass of the Banished
• New monsters to rip to pieces: get to know the locals, such as the Jerkshroom and the Yeeter
• New weapons to play with: trim sticking-out heads with the Scythe Claw, or make them dance to the sound of the Rhythm n' Bouzouki
• New boss to fight against: Mama Tick is dying to meet you

FATAL FALLS DLC
Ready for a leap of faith?
• 3 new biomes - Get some fresh air at the Fractured Shrines, splash around at the Undying Shores and take a picture at the Mausoleum
• 8 new monsters - The Cold Blooded Guardians and their friends would love to teach you about their culture. ... Wait, aren't those relatives of yours in the Undying Shores...?
• 7 new weapons - Lil' Serenade is perfect for breaking the ice with the locals, although the Snake Fangs would make for a perfect souvenir...
• 1 new boss - The Scarecrow is very proud of his gardening skills and won't hesitate to show off


QUEEN AND THE SEA  DLC
Take it to the sea!
• 2 new biomes - Battle your way through a rotten shipwreck, or scale a burning lighthouse and confront your deadliest foe yet.
• 9 new weapons, including a throwable shark, a trident and a pirate hook hand (eyepatch not included). 
• 2 new bosses - Don't lose your head before you meet the Queen!

This DLC also gives you the usual extras: 
- A not-so-cute pet. 
- Loads of new outfits. 
- New enemies to bash.

WARNING: Devices with less than 2 Gb of RAM may not be able to run this content correctly. We recommend not to take this DLC if your device is under 2gb of RAM.

 with as much information as possible on the issue.

故事始於某天早晨，你從突然到訪的老紳士那裏收到了正式公會成員證書，前往格林加爾德共和國的小村莊赴任。 共和國中發生的各種事件、與鄰國林達爾帝國的紛爭、騎士與龍的故事，最終都將成為圍繞星辰的宏大命運旋渦，將你卷入其中。

《Halls of Torment》是一款生存遊戲，畫面採用預先渲染的復古風，類似於1990年代晚期的角色扮演遊戲。從多名英雄角色中選擇一名操控，並進入致命的苦痛殿堂闖蕩。對抗不潔的恐怖生物，並在敵人一波波的攻勢下努力求生，直到其中一位苦痛領主登場。使用角色特長、技能和物品強化英雄。在闖關過程中打造全新強力流派。探索地底的各個地方，尋找全新強力物品，讓你能夠闖入更黑暗的深淵。

2023年Steam年度最佳肉鸽遊戲Halls of Torment現已上線移動端，快來加入這場90年代復古風格ARPG的生存挑戰吧！

【遊戲特色】
◆闖關只要30分鐘，輕鬆又快速

◆ 可送回遊戲主世界並用於後續闖關的獨特物品
◆ 調製魔法藥水，讓命運女神祝你一臂之力
◆ 解鎖各個職業的力量，並和你指定的角色結合
◆ 找到稀有版本的物品，進一步優化你的流派配置

【完整內容清單】

mo.description:
Atomic Space Age was a blast! Until it became the Post-Apocalyptic Space Age.

Your space station is about to explode and you only have 60 seconds before things get messy. What (or who) will you grab before you make a mad dash for the emergency shuttle and begin your journey into THE GREAT UNKNOWN?

This is 60 Parsecs!, a dark comedy sci-fi adventure set in the Atomic Space Age - complete with all the Cold War paranoia, chrome-plated wall accents and cockroaches with space helmets.

Lead a crew of woefully unprepared astronauts, equipped with whatever junk - sorry - "supplies" you can grab before blasting off, on a journey across the cosmos that's best described as misguided. Make the best of it, while dealing with soup shortages and other horrors of outer space. Will you have what it takes to find a new home and survive?

Bon voyage!


SCAVENGE & EVACUATE
With only 60 seconds before nukes reduce the space station to floating particles in the vacuum of space, frantically grab whatever supplies and crew you can before getting out of there. You never know when that sock puppet will come in handy.

SURVIVE & DECIDE
Space funerals are inconvenient, so try to avoid dying where possible. Use your limited supplies and (hopefully not limited) wits to make difficult choices and ensure your survival, even though the odds are definitely stacked against you.

EXPLORE & CRAFT
Duct tape fixes all problems, but how do you fix (or at least craft) duct tape? Chart expeditions to find resources, craft survival essentials and explore strange new worlds in a procedural, very-much-permadeath adventure.

LEAD & PROTECT
As captain, it's your duty to keep the crew happy - they're less likely to kill you that way. Manage relationships as you watch them grow closer and hopefully not throw each other out the airlock.

mo.description:
Dolores, Ted, Mary Jane and Timmy return to face the nuclear apocalypse in this new, remastered edition of the classic atomic adventure - 60 Seconds! Reatomized, featuring high resolution art support, refreshed 2D graphics and hand-drawn 3D textures, new interactive menu, improved UI system, a technical refresh, and of course... new content!

NEW GAMEPLAY MODE
Survival Challenges - unique, short storylines which will put your survival skills to the test!

NEW OPPORTUNITIES
to escape the wasteland in form of a storyline spanning across multiple playthroughs! Can you escape the wasteland in style?

NEW RELATIONSHIP SYSTEM
more stories and crazy interactions between the McDoodle family members!

NEW SOUNDS, ART AND UNLOCKABLE VISUAL CONTENT
allowing you to add a little color to your fallout shelter!

NEW ACHIEVEMENTS!

With only 60 seconds left to impact, go on a mad dash through the house in search of family members and useful supplies. Everything will be against you: time, your very own furniture, a house that's different every time you play, and the fundamental question... what to take with you and who to leave behind?

Reaching the fallout shelter in time, alive, is only the beginning. Whatever you scavenged and whoever you saved will play a vital role in your survival. Each survival story will be different, with every day surprising you with unexpected events. Will all of these stories end well? It's up to you. Ration food and water, make best use of your supplies, face difficult choices and even venture into the wasteland.

Good luck.

mo.description:
Dwarf Fortress is a famous fantasy world simulation/management game from Bay 12 Games. This app allows you to play Fortress Mode remotely on your mobile device.

Dwarf Fortress is an open-ended fantasy world simulation/management game from Bay 12 Games, which is in constant development since 2002. In Fortress mode, player indirectly controls a group of dwarves, attempting to construct a successful and wealthy fortress. The game features a highly detailed procedurally generated fantasy world with multiple civilizations and wildlife, realistic geology, weather effects. You will have dozens of different building and items to construct, hundreds of materials, advanced military system, agriculture, sieges and underground monsters, diplomacy and trading.

ATTENTION: Internet connection is required to play. The original game with a plugin (both free) running at your home or on a cloud server will be required, visit mifki.com/df/setup for details. Alternatively, you can purchase a server subscription from within the app, in which case we will manage a server for you, visit mifki.com/df/subscription for details.

Supported Dwarf Fortress version is 0.47.05.

Visit bay12games.com/dwarves for full information about Dwarf Fortress. However, please report any issues with this application to mifki.com/df/support and NOT to the original game authors.

mo.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

# Support & Legal #

mo.description:
Death is not the end.

Play as a failed alchemic experiment and explore the sprawling, ever-changing castle to find out what happened on this gloomy island…! 
That is, assuming you’re able to fight your way past its keepers.

Dead Cells is a roguevania action platformer that will require you to master frantic 2D combat with a wide variety of weapons and skills against merciless minions and boss.

Kill. Die. Learn. Repeat.

First available on PC and consoles, the indie hit Dead Cells is now slaying foes on mobile!

Main Features
• Roguevania: The progressive exploration of an interconnected world, with the replayability of a rogue-lite and the adrenaline-pumping threat of permadeath

• Frantic and Dynamic 2D Action: Learn your enemies’ patterns to stay alive, or prepare to be sent back to your cell before you can say “baguette”

• Nonlinear Progression: Unlock new levels with every death, opt for the path that suits your current build, your playstyle or just your mood. 
Surely, the ramparts can’t be as bad as the sewers, right?

• Play at your own pace: Will you explore every nook and cranny of the castle, or rush to the end?

*Latest updates are available: Clean Cut & The End is Near*

RETURN TO CASTLEVANIA DLC
Time for some vampire slaying
• New storyline - overcome the Ruler of Darkness alongside Alucard and Richter Belmont,
• 2 new biomes - Explore Dracula's Castle and its outskirts
• 9 new monsters - Werewolves, haunted armors, and medusas are waiting for you
• 14 new weapons - wield the Vampire Killer or the Holy Water to defeat creatures of the night,
• 3 new bosses - go fangs to fangs against Death and Dracula himself
• 20 new outfits - dress as your favorite Castlevania characters such as Simon and Richter Belmont or Alucard
• Alternative soundtracks - play along 51 Castlevania original tracks and 12 tunes reimagined in the style of Dead Cells

THE BAD SEED DLC
You reap what you sow
• New levels to lose your head in the not-so-peaceful Dilapidated Arboretum and the noxious Morass of the Banished
• New monsters to rip to pieces: get to know the locals, such as the Jerkshroom and the Yeeter
• New weapons to play with: trim sticking-out heads with the Scythe Claw, or make them dance to the sound of the Rhythm n' Bouzouki
• New boss to fight against: Mama Tick is dying to meet you

FATAL FALLS DLC
Ready for a leap of faith?
• 3 new biomes - Get some fresh air at the Fractured Shrines, splash around at the Undying Shores and take a picture at the Mausoleum
• 8 new monsters - The Cold Blooded Guardians and their friends would love to teach you about their culture. ... Wait, aren't those relatives of yours in the Undying Shores...?
• 7 new weapons - Lil' Serenade is perfect for breaking the ice with the locals, although the Snake Fangs would make for a perfect souvenir...
• 1 new boss - The Scarecrow is very proud of his gardening skills and won't hesitate to show off


QUEEN AND THE SEA  DLC
Take it to the sea!
• 2 new biomes - Battle your way through a rotten shipwreck, or scale a burning lighthouse and confront your deadliest foe yet.
• 9 new weapons, including a throwable shark, a trident and a pirate hook hand (eyepatch not included). 
• 2 new bosses - Don't lose your head before you meet the Queen!

This DLC also gives you the usual extras: 
- A not-so-cute pet. 
- Loads of new outfits. 
- New enemies to bash.

WARNING: Devices with less than 2 Gb of RAM may not be able to run this content correctly. We recommend not to take this DLC if your device is under 2gb of RAM.


Carefully redesigned for mobile with a revamped interface
• Two game modes available: Original & Auto-Hit

• Custom controls & More touch controls options available: Change the buttons’ position and size to your liking, swipe to dodge…

• MFi external controller support

• No ads, no F2P mechanics!

If you run into a problem, please contact us at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com
 with as much information as possible on the issue.

mo.description:
稀有寶物！轉職系統！宏大的劇情！
充滿鑽研要素的正統砍殺（Hack & Slash）RPG《騎士與龍》第四彈！

《騎士與龍 4》是建構在中世紀奇幻世界觀下的砍殺類RPG系列的第四部作品。

故事發生在上一部前作（III）的世界約三十年前。大國「林達爾帝國」與埃爾多魯亞諸王國之一的「朗海姆王國」之間持續著「百年戰爭」。故事的舞台始於這兩大國邊境附近的難民營。
在這個充滿陰謀的世界裡，各色人物因戰爭而命運交錯。各自的騎士與龍的故事，最終將朝著同一個結局邁進。請盡情體驗這部前作角色也會登場的宏大故事。

【騎士與龍 4 的特點】
▽白熱化的即時戰鬥：稀有道具掉落、轉職等「深度鑽研型RPG」的基本系統沿襲前作！
▽隊伍增至6人：隊伍成員增加到6人。指令選擇時時間會暫停，操作更加直觀！
▽更具深度的戰鬥：新增「陣型」、「技能連攜」等新系統，戰鬥系統更加洗鍊，鑽研要素大幅增加！
▽新職業登場：新增「獸使」、「角鬥士」，職業總數達到8種。現有職業也追加了新的技能！

mo.description:
Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ；
你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。

你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。

「Card.Note」九大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.全局手势化
下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。

5.语音录入
打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

6.要事提醒：
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

7.快捷高效
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

8.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

9.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

tw.description:
Atomic Space Age was a blast! Until it became the Post-Apocalyptic Space Age.

Your space station is about to explode and you only have 60 seconds before things get messy. What (or who) will you grab before you make a mad dash for the emergency shuttle and begin your journey into THE GREAT UNKNOWN?

This is 60 Parsecs!, a dark comedy sci-fi adventure set in the Atomic Space Age - complete with all the Cold War paranoia, chrome-plated wall accents and cockroaches with space helmets.

Lead a crew of woefully unprepared astronauts, equipped with whatever junk - sorry - "supplies" you can grab before blasting off, on a journey across the cosmos that's best described as misguided. Make the best of it, while dealing with soup shortages and other horrors of outer space. Will you have what it takes to find a new home and survive?

Bon voyage!


SCAVENGE & EVACUATE
With only 60 seconds before nukes reduce the space station to floating particles in the vacuum of space, frantically grab whatever supplies and crew you can before getting out of there. You never know when that sock puppet will come in handy.

SURVIVE & DECIDE
Space funerals are inconvenient, so try to avoid dying where possible. Use your limited supplies and (hopefully not limited) wits to make difficult choices and ensure your survival, even though the odds are definitely stacked against you.

EXPLORE & CRAFT
Duct tape fixes all problems, but how do you fix (or at least craft) duct tape? Chart expeditions to find resources, craft survival essentials and explore strange new worlds in a procedural, very-much-permadeath adventure.

LEAD & PROTECT
As captain, it's your duty to keep the crew happy - they're less likely to kill you that way. Manage relationships as you watch them grow closer and hopefully not throw each other out the airlock.

Dolores, Ted, Mary Jane and Timmy return to face the nuclear apocalypse in this new, remastered edition of the classic atomic adventure - 60 Seconds! Reatomized, featuring high resolution art support, refreshed 2D graphics and hand-drawn 3D textures, new interactive menu, improved UI system, a technical refresh, and of course... new content!

NEW GAMEPLAY MODE
Survival Challenges - unique, short storylines which will put your survival skills to the test!

NEW OPPORTUNITIES
to escape the wasteland in form of a storyline spanning across multiple playthroughs! Can you escape the wasteland in style?

NEW RELATIONSHIP SYSTEM
more stories and crazy interactions between the McDoodle family members!

NEW SOUNDS, ART AND UNLOCKABLE VISUAL CONTENT
allowing you to add a little color to your fallout shelter!

NEW ACHIEVEMENTS!

With only 60 seconds left to impact, go on a mad dash through the house in search of family members and useful supplies. Everything will be against you: time, your very own furniture, a house that's different every time you play, and the fundamental question... what to take with you and who to leave behind?

Reaching the fallout shelter in time, alive, is only the beginning. Whatever you scavenged and whoever you saved will play a vital role in your survival. Each survival story will be different, with every day surprising you with unexpected events. Will all of these stories end well? It's up to you. Ration food and water, make best use of your supplies, face difficult choices and even venture into the wasteland.

Good luck.

tw.description:
Motorsport Manager Mobile 3 is the ultimate race team strategy game. 

Build up your very own motorsport team from scratch, making every big decision. Hire the drivers, assemble the team, develop your car and mastermind your way to glory.

• This is your racing team. Hire drivers, develop your car and invest in technology.
• Work with your drivers to achieve the perfect qualifying lap.
• Formulate the ideal pitstop strategy to win races.
• Watch the race in real-time or jump into the strategy screens to take control of the action.
• React to weather changes, crashes and safety car periods.
• Win championships across the world to reach the pinnacle of motorsport.

New in MM Mobile 3
=====================
GT AND ENDURANCE RACING
With 6 new championships, MM Mobile 3 is bigger and better than ever before. GT races bring action-packed, wheel-to-wheel action, while Endurance is a Motorsport Manager’s ultimate strategic challenge, with 3 drivers per car and timed races!

A STUNNING SETTING
Monaco makes its Motorsport Manager debut! Manage your cars around la Rascasse, Casino Square and the Swimming Pool. It’s the ultimate test, rendered in a beautiful, detailed new art style.

AUGMENTED REALITY
AR support brings you the ultimate camera mode! Choose your own perspective on the race. Peer over trees, through bridges and down cliffsides as you experience races in a whole new way.

NEW FEATURES
The Supplier Network sees managers grow their team’s presence around the globe, while Invitational Races are huge annual events, bringing international races with a unique twist. Mechanics are the new members of your team, and their relationship with the driver is all-important!

GAME CHANGERS
Votes on rule changes, dynamic AI team movement (including teams going bust and being replaced) and new difficulty settings mean that the world of motorsport constantly evolves – but the challenge stays at your level.

ON-TRACK ACTION

tw.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

tw.description:
Death is not the end.

Play as a failed alchemic experiment and explore the sprawling, ever-changing castle to find out what happened on this gloomy island…! 
That is, assuming you’re able to fight your way past its keepers.

Dead Cells is a roguevania action platformer that will require you to master frantic 2D combat with a wide variety of weapons and skills against merciless minions and boss.

Kill. Die. Learn. Repeat.

First available on PC and consoles, the indie hit Dead Cells is now slaying foes on mobile!

Main Features
• Roguevania: The progressive exploration of an interconnected world, with the replayability of a rogue-lite and the adrenaline-pumping threat of permadeath

• Frantic and Dynamic 2D Action: Learn your enemies’ patterns to stay alive, or prepare to be sent back to your cell before you can say “baguette”

• Nonlinear Progression: Unlock new levels with every death, opt for the path that suits your current build, your playstyle or just your mood. 
Surely, the ramparts can’t be as bad as the sewers, right?

• Play at your own pace: Will you explore every nook and cranny of the castle, or rush to the end?

*Latest updates are available: Clean Cut & The End is Near*

RETURN TO CASTLEVANIA DLC
Time for some vampire slaying
• New storyline - overcome the Ruler of Darkness alongside Alucard and Richter Belmont,
• 2 new biomes - Explore Dracula's Castle and its outskirts
• 9 new monsters - Werewolves, haunted armors, and medusas are waiting for you
• 14 new weapons - wield the Vampire Killer or the Holy Water to defeat creatures of the night,
• 3 new bosses - go fangs to fangs against Death and Dracula himself
• 20 new outfits - dress as your favorite Castlevania characters such as Simon and Richter Belmont or Alucard
• Alternative soundtracks - play along 51 Castlevania original tracks and 12 tunes reimagined in the style of Dead Cells

THE BAD SEED DLC
You reap what you sow
• New levels to lose your head in the not-so-peaceful Dilapidated Arboretum and the noxious Morass of the Banished
• New monsters to rip to pieces: get to know the locals, such as the Jerkshroom and the Yeeter
• New weapons to play with: trim sticking-out heads with the Scythe Claw, or make them dance to the sound of the Rhythm n' Bouzouki
• New boss to fight against: Mama Tick is dying to meet you

FATAL FALLS DLC
Ready for a leap of faith?
• 3 new biomes - Get some fresh air at the Fractured Shrines, splash around at the Undying Shores and take a picture at the Mausoleum
• 8 new monsters - The Cold Blooded Guardians and their friends would love to teach you about their culture. ... Wait, aren't those relatives of yours in the Undying Shores...?
• 7 new weapons - Lil' Serenade is perfect for breaking the ice with the locals, although the Snake Fangs would make for a perfect souvenir...
• 1 new boss - The Scarecrow is very proud of his gardening skills and won't hesitate to show off


QUEEN AND THE SEA  DLC
Take it to the sea!
• 2 new biomes - Battle your way through a rotten shipwreck, or scale a burning lighthouse and confront your deadliest foe yet.
• 9 new weapons, including a throwable shark, a trident and a pirate hook hand (eyepatch not included). 
• 2 new bosses - Don't lose your head before you meet the Queen!

This DLC also gives you the usual extras: 
- A not-so-cute pet. 
- Loads of new outfits. 
- New enemies to bash.

WARNING: Devices with less than 2 Gb of RAM may not be able to run this content correctly. We recommend not to take this DLC if your device is under 2gb of RAM.


Carefully redesigned for mobile with a revamped interface
• Two game modes available: Original & Auto-Hit

• Custom controls & More touch controls options available: Change the buttons’ position and size to your liking, swipe to dodge…

• MFi external controller support

• No ads, no F2P mechanics!

If you run into a problem, please contact us at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com
 with as much information as possible on the issue.

us.description:
Atomic Space Age was a blast! Until it became the Post-Apocalyptic Space Age.

Your space station is about to explode and you only have 60 seconds before things get messy. What (or who) will you grab before you make a mad dash for the emergency shuttle and begin your journey into THE GREAT UNKNOWN?

This is 60 Parsecs!, a dark comedy sci-fi adventure set in the Atomic Space Age - complete with all the Cold War paranoia, chrome-plated wall accents and cockroaches with space helmets.

Lead a crew of woefully unprepared astronauts, equipped with whatever junk - sorry - "supplies" you can grab before blasting off, on a journey across the cosmos that's best described as misguided. Make the best of it, while dealing with soup shortages and other horrors of outer space. Will you have what it takes to find a new home and survive?

Bon voyage!


SCAVENGE & EVACUATE
With only 60 seconds before nukes reduce the space station to floating particles in the vacuum of space, frantically grab whatever supplies and crew you can before getting out of there. You never know when that sock puppet will come in handy.

SURVIVE & DECIDE
Space funerals are inconvenient, so try to avoid dying where possible. Use your limited supplies and (hopefully not limited) wits to make difficult choices and ensure your survival, even though the odds are definitely stacked against you.

EXPLORE & CRAFT
Duct tape fixes all problems, but how do you fix (or at least craft) duct tape? Chart expeditions to find resources, craft survival essentials and explore strange new worlds in a procedural, very-much-permadeath adventure.

LEAD & PROTECT
As captain, it's your duty to keep the crew happy - they're less likely to kill you that way. Manage relationships as you watch them grow closer and hopefully not throw each other out the airlock.

us.description:
Dolores, Ted, Mary Jane and Timmy return to face the nuclear apocalypse in this new, remastered edition of the classic atomic adventure - 60 Seconds! Reatomized, featuring high resolution art support, refreshed 2D graphics and hand-drawn 3D textures, new interactive menu, improved UI system, a technical refresh, and of course... new content!

NEW GAMEPLAY MODE
Survival Challenges - unique, short storylines which will put your survival skills to the test!

NEW OPPORTUNITIES
to escape the wasteland in form of a storyline spanning across multiple playthroughs! Can you escape the wasteland in style?

NEW RELATIONSHIP SYSTEM
more stories and crazy interactions between the McDoodle family members!

NEW SOUNDS, ART AND UNLOCKABLE VISUAL CONTENT
allowing you to add a little color to your fallout shelter!

NEW ACHIEVEMENTS!

With only 60 seconds left to impact, go on a mad dash through the house in search of family members and useful supplies. Everything will be against you: time, your very own furniture, a house that's different every time you play, and the fundamental question... what to take with you and who to leave behind?

Reaching the fallout shelter in time, alive, is only the beginning. Whatever you scavenged and whoever you saved will play a vital role in your survival. Each survival story will be different, with every day surprising you with unexpected events. Will all of these stories end well? It's up to you. Ration food and water, make best use of your supplies, face difficult choices and even venture into the wasteland.

Good luck.

Discover and conquer countless worlds across deep space. Unravel a story full of challenges and threats that will lead you across the galaxy on an extraordinary voyage. 

Nothing lasts long in deep space, and peace is not an exception!
Welcome to Iron Marines: Invasion!

Enjoy unique stage missions and special operations in exciting new worlds, each one with its own particular terrain, style, enemies, and conditions. Learn how to beat them one by one!

Command the Federation’s troops across the galaxy, with the aid of Heroes & Units that will allow you to boost your RTS game skills to the limit.

Battle extraordinary enemies and ferocious alien creatures in fun and electrifying missions. Plan your strategy to defend the peace in the galaxy!

For all Iron Marines & SciFi action fans who get the kicks of offline RTS games and strategy games. Become the tactical specialist you’re meant to be by leading your own army in thrilling, mind-blowing missions.

The invasion is at our gates!
Lead the fiercest combat corps across the galaxy. Fight side by side with the Federation’s toughest Marines!

Now you can combine your squad and take advantage of each Unit’s unique fighting skills: from rangers to snipers, mechas, missile launchers, or fearsome alien warrior clans.

Train jaw-dropping heroes and their useful abilities: from boosting up your army’s morale and firepower to increase their stamina and reach, or detecting upcoming enemies before they attack you. Help them join the fight to keep peace among the worlds!

Become an expert on the galaxy’s biggest mysteries!

Use an in-game Encyclopedia to understand the worlds you explore or identify the enemies you face. Take advantage of the tactical info available to configure your strategic game plan.

Prove yourself in daily challenges and collect amazing rewards.

Iron Marines Invasion will give you hours of colorful, fun gameplay in this epic real-time strategy space odyssey, available to play RTS offline game.

us.description:
Death is not the end.

Play as a failed alchemic experiment and explore the sprawling, ever-changing castle to find out what happened on this gloomy island…! 
That is, assuming you’re able to fight your way past its keepers.

Dead Cells is a roguevania action platformer that will require you to master frantic 2D combat with a wide variety of weapons and skills against merciless minions and boss.

Kill. Die. Learn. Repeat.

First available on PC and consoles, the indie hit Dead Cells is now slaying foes on mobile!

Main Features
• Roguevania: The progressive exploration of an interconnected world, with the replayability of a rogue-lite and the adrenaline-pumping threat of permadeath

• Frantic and Dynamic 2D Action: Learn your enemies’ patterns to stay alive, or prepare to be sent back to your cell before you can say “baguette”

• Nonlinear Progression: Unlock new levels with every death, opt for the path that suits your current build, your playstyle or just your mood. 
Surely, the ramparts can’t be as bad as the sewers, right?

• Play at your own pace: Will you explore every nook and cranny of the castle, or rush to the end?

*Latest updates are available: Clean Cut & The End is Near*

RETURN TO CASTLEVANIA DLC
Time for some vampire slaying
• New storyline - overcome the Ruler of Darkness alongside Alucard and Richter Belmont,
• 2 new biomes - Explore Dracula's Castle and its outskirts
• 9 new monsters - Werewolves, haunted armors, and medusas are waiting for you
• 14 new weapons - wield the Vampire Killer or the Holy Water to defeat creatures of the night,
• 3 new bosses - go fangs to fangs against Death and Dracula himself
• 20 new outfits - dress as your favorite Castlevania characters such as Simon and Richter Belmont or Alucard
• Alternative soundtracks - play along 51 Castlevania original tracks and 12 tunes reimagined in the style of Dead Cells

THE BAD SEED DLC
You reap what you sow
• New levels to lose your head in the not-so-peaceful Dilapidated Arboretum and the noxious Morass of the Banished
• New monsters to rip to pieces: get to know the locals, such as the Jerkshroom and the Yeeter
• New weapons to play with: trim sticking-out heads with the Scythe Claw, or make them dance to the sound of the Rhythm n' Bouzouki
• New boss to fight against: Mama Tick is dying to meet you

FATAL FALLS DLC
Ready for a leap of faith?
• 3 new biomes - Get some fresh air at the Fractured Shrines, splash around at the Undying Shores and take a picture at the Mausoleum
• 8 new monsters - The Cold Blooded Guardians and their friends would love to teach you about their culture. ... Wait, aren't those relatives of yours in the Undying Shores...?
• 7 new weapons - Lil' Serenade is perfect for breaking the ice with the locals, although the Snake Fangs would make for a perfect souvenir...
• 1 new boss - The Scarecrow is very proud of his gardening skills and won't hesitate to show off


QUEEN AND THE SEA  DLC
Take it to the sea!
• 2 new biomes - Battle your way through a rotten shipwreck, or scale a burning lighthouse and confront your deadliest foe yet.
• 9 new weapons, including a throwable shark, a trident and a pirate hook hand (eyepatch not included). 
• 2 new bosses - Don't lose your head before you meet the Queen!

This DLC also gives you the usual extras: 
- A not-so-cute pet. 
- Loads of new outfits. 
- New enemies to bash.

WARNING: Devices with less than 2 Gb of RAM may not be able to run this content correctly. We recommend not to take this DLC if your device is under 2gb of RAM.


Carefully redesigned for mobile with a revamped interface
• Two game modes available: Original & Auto-Hit

• Custom controls & More touch controls options available: Change the buttons’ position and size to your liking, swipe to dodge…

• MFi external controller support

• No ads, no F2P mechanics!

If you run into a problem, please contact us at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com
 with as much information as possible on the issue.

Genius Scan is a document scanner app in your pocket. Quickly scan your paper documents on the go and export them as multi-page PDF files.

*** Apple App of the Week *** 20+ million users *** 1000s of small businesses ***

Place any document in front of your device’s camera: our scanner app automatically recognizes the paper against the background, crops it, and cleans up the result. You obtain a crisp, legible scan. Batch scanning lets you scan dozens of pages in a matter of seconds. Powerful tools help you organize, share, or archive your documents.

“Next time you plan to hit the road, don’t forget to download Genius Scan to make life easier for yourself and your accounting department.” - AppPicker.com

“Camera apps aren’t designed for close-up text scanning, but Genius Scan is.” - The Guardian

== ENTERPRISE EDITION ==

Genius Scan Plus Premium Plan:

- All the premium features of the Genius Scan Plus Premium Plan (denoted with + below), out of the box (no upgrade needed).

Managed Configuration:

- Deployment to fleets of devices managed by a MDM tool
- Pre-configuration of app settings on a per-user basis (eg. set default email address, WebDAV/FTP credentials)
- Control of which apps and services users can export documents to
- No ads

== KEY FEATURES == 

Smart Scanning:

- Document detection & background removal
- Distortion correction
- Shadow removal and defect cleanup
- Filters (black & white, whiteboard, photo)
- Batch scanning

PDF Creation & Editing:

- Multiple page PDF creation

Security & Privacy:

Document Organization:

Export:

OCR (Text Recognition):

== ABOUT US ==

It’s in the heart of Paris, France that The Grizzly Labs develops Genius Scan. us.description:
Rare drops! Class changes! And an epic story.
The 4th installment of the hardcore Hack & Slash RPG "Knight & Dragon," packed with replay value!

"Knight & Dragon 4" is the fourth title in this Hack & Slash RPG series built within a medieval fantasy world.

The story takes place about 30 years prior to the events of the previous game, III. The setting is the "Hundred Years' War" between the great Lindar Empire and the Kingdom of Langheim, one of the Eldorua kingdoms. The journey begins in a refugee camp located near the border of these two great powers.
In a world swirling with conspiracy, people from all walks of life are swept up in the chaos of war. The stories of their respective knights and dragons eventually converge toward a single conclusion. Enjoy an epic narrative featuring characters from previous titles.

[Features of Knight & Dragon 4]

* Heated Real-Time Battles: The core systems of a "replayable RPG," such as rare item drops and class changes, follow the beloved formula of previous titles!
* Expanded Party Size: You can now battle with a party of 6 members. Time pauses while selecting commands, allowing for more intuitive control!
* Deep Strategic Gameplay: With new systems like "Formations" and "Skill Chaining," the battle system is more refined, offering even more depth and replayability!
* New Jobs Added: With the addition of the "Beast Tamer" and "Gladiator," there are now 8 jobs in total. New skills have also been added to complement existing jobs!
* Revamped World: A completely renewed world map to color the epic story. Of course, post-game content is included!
* Legacy Content: Many characters from the previous game appear, with significant text additions that supplement the scenarios of the past titles!
* Classic Features: Popular basic functions from the previous game, such as Party Dispatch, Persona functions, and Equipment Enhancement/Customization, are all here!

...

If you would like to experience the atmosphere of the game before purchasing, the previous title "Knight & Dragon" is available completely free of charge, so please give it a try.

Official Website
http://dgjam.com/knightdragon4

Rare Items! Class Change! And an epic story.
The third installment of the full-fledged hack-and-slash RPG "Knight and Dragon," packed with replayability!

"Knight and Dragon 3" is the third installment in the hack-and-slash RPG series set in a medieval fantasy world.

One morning, after receiving a certificate from an elderly gentleman, proving you as a full-fledged guild member, you are sent to a small village in the Republic of Gringard. This is where the story begins. Various incidents occurring in the Republic, the conflicts with the neighboring Lindahl Empire, and the story of knights and dragons will eventually involve you in a grand destiny revolving around the stars.

[Features of Knight and Dragon 3]
▽ The basic systems of a replayable RPG such as intense real-time battles, rare item drops, and class changes are inherited from the previous game!
▽ Real-time battles are now more interactive, allowing you to dodge, parry, and counter by reading the enemy’s attack timings!
▽ A variety of weapons like axes, spears, and halberds appear among the items! Additionally, you can create characters to your liking, including dual-wielding and two-handed weapons!
▽ A world map that enhances the epic story is introduced! The story, with even more volume than the previous game, and the end content are still going strong!
▽ Moreover, in this game, a diverse range of NPCs with unique characteristics, place names, city names, and other proper nouns depict the grand story!
▽ Other features such as party dispatch and the Persona function, which were well received in the previous game, are of course continued!

・・・

For those who want to get a feel for the game before purchasing, the previous game "Knight and Dragon" is completely free to enjoy, so please give it a try.

us.description:
Dwarf Fortress is a famous fantasy world simulation/management game from Bay 12 Games. This app allows you to play Fortress Mode remotely on your mobile device.

Dwarf Fortress is an open-ended fantasy world simulation/management game from Bay 12 Games, which is in constant development since 2002. In Fortress mode, player indirectly controls a group of dwarves, attempting to construct a successful and wealthy fortress. The game features a highly detailed procedurally generated fantasy world with multiple civilizations and wildlife, realistic geology, weather effects. You will have dozens of different building and items to construct, hundreds of materials, advanced military system, agriculture, sieges and underground monsters, diplomacy and trading.

ATTENTION: Internet connection is required to play. The original game with a plugin (both free) running at your home or on a cloud server will be required, visit mifki.com/df/setup for details. Alternatively, you can purchase a server subscription from within the app, in which case we will manage a server for you, visit mifki.com/df/subscription for details.

Supported Dwarf Fortress version is 0.47.05.

tr.description:
Atomic Space Age was a blast! Until it became the Post-Apocalyptic Space Age.

Your space station is about to explode and you only have 60 seconds before things get messy. What (or who) will you grab before you make a mad dash for the emergency shuttle and begin your journey into THE GREAT UNKNOWN?

This is 60 Parsecs!, a dark comedy sci-fi adventure set in the Atomic Space Age - complete with all the Cold War paranoia, chrome-plated wall accents and cockroaches with space helmets.

Lead a crew of woefully unprepared astronauts, equipped with whatever junk - sorry - "supplies" you can grab before blasting off, on a journey across the cosmos that's best described as misguided. Make the best of it, while dealing with soup shortages and other horrors of outer space. Will you have what it takes to find a new home and survive?

Bon voyage!


SCAVENGE & EVACUATE
With only 60 seconds before nukes reduce the space station to floating particles in the vacuum of space, frantically grab whatever supplies and crew you can before getting out of there. You never know when that sock puppet will come in handy.

SURVIVE & DECIDE
Space funerals are inconvenient, so try to avoid dying where possible. Use your limited supplies and (hopefully not limited) wits to make difficult choices and ensure your survival, even though the odds are definitely stacked against you.

EXPLORE & CRAFT
Duct tape fixes all problems, but how do you fix (or at least craft) duct tape? Chart expeditions to find resources, craft survival essentials and explore strange new worlds in a procedural, very-much-permadeath adventure.

LEAD & PROTECT
As captain, it's your duty to keep the crew happy - they're less likely to kill you that way. Manage relationships as you watch them grow closer and hopefully not throw each other out the airlock.

tr.description:
Death is not the end.

Play as a failed alchemic experiment and explore the sprawling, ever-changing castle to find out what happened on this gloomy island…! 
That is, assuming you’re able to fight your way past its keepers.

Dead Cells is a roguevania action platformer that will require you to master frantic 2D combat with a wide variety of weapons and skills against merciless minions and boss.

Kill. Die. Learn. Repeat.

First available on PC and consoles, the indie hit Dead Cells is now slaying foes on mobile!

Main Features
• Roguevania: The progressive exploration of an interconnected world, with the replayability of a rogue-lite and the adrenaline-pumping threat of permadeath

• Frantic and Dynamic 2D Action: Learn your enemies’ patterns to stay alive, or prepare to be sent back to your cell before you can say “baguette”

• Nonlinear Progression: Unlock new levels with every death, opt for the path that suits your current build, your playstyle or just your mood. 
Surely, the ramparts can’t be as bad as the sewers, right?

• Play at your own pace: Will you explore every nook and cranny of the castle, or rush to the end?

*Latest updates are available: Clean Cut & The End is Near*

RETURN TO CASTLEVANIA DLC
Time for some vampire slaying
• New storyline - overcome the Ruler of Darkness alongside Alucard and Richter Belmont,
• 2 new biomes - Explore Dracula's Castle and its outskirts
• 9 new monsters - Werewolves, haunted armors, and medusas are waiting for you

• 20 new outfits - dress as your favorite Castlevania characters such as Simon and Richter Belmont or Alucard
• Alternative soundtracks - play along 51 Castlevania original tracks and 12 tunes reimagined in the style of Dead Cells

THE BAD SEED DLC
You reap what you sow
• New levels to lose your head in the not-so-peaceful Dilapidated Arboretum and the noxious Morass of the Banished
• New monsters to rip to pieces: get to know the locals, such as the Jerkshroom and the Yeeter
• New weapons to play with: trim sticking-out heads with the Scythe Claw, or make them dance to the sound of the Rhythm n' Bouzouki
• New boss to fight against: Mama Tick is dying to meet you

FATAL FALLS DLC
Ready for a leap of faith?

• 8 new monsters - The Cold Blooded Guardians and their friends would love to teach you about their culture. ... Wait, aren't those relatives of yours in the Undying Shores...?

tr.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ALS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

### Core Features ###
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality


### Fully Customizable for Your Practice ###
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour


### First Responder & Post-Code Tools ###
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review


### Evidence-Based Flowcharts ###
ALS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on ALS and Post-Resuscitation Care guidelines from AHA and ERC


### Built for Healthcare Professionals ###
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

Rare drops! Class changes! And an epic story.
The 4th installment of the hardcore Hack & Slash RPG "Knight & Dragon," packed with replay value!

"Knight & Dragon 4" is the fourth title in this Hack & Slash RPG series built within a medieval fantasy world.

The story takes place about 30 years prior to the events of the previous game, III. The setting is the "Hundred Years' War" between the great Lindar Empire and the Kingdom of Langheim, one of the Eldorua kingdoms. The journey begins in a refugee camp located near the border of these two great powers.
In a world swirling with conspiracy, people from all walks of life are swept up in the chaos of war. The stories of their respective knights and dragons eventually converge toward a single conclusion. Enjoy an epic narrative featuring characters from previous titles.

[Features of Knight & Dragon 4]

* Heated Real-Time Battles: The core systems of a "replayable RPG," such as rare item drops and class changes, follow the beloved formula of previous titles!
* Expanded Party Size: You can now battle with a party of 6 members. Time pauses while selecting commands, allowing for more intuitive control!
* Deep Strategic Gameplay: With new systems like "Formations" and "Skill Chaining," the battle system is more refined, offering even more depth and replayability!
* New Jobs Added: With the addition of the "Beast Tamer" and "Gladiator," there are now 8 jobs in total. New skills have also been added to complement existing jobs!
* Revamped World: A completely renewed world map to color the epic story. Of course, post-game content is included!
* Legacy Content: Many characters from the previous game appear, with significant text additions that supplement the scenarios of the past titles!
* Classic Features: Popular basic functions from the previous game, such as Party Dispatch, Persona functions, and Equipment Enhancement/Customization, are all here!

...

"Knight and Dragon 3" is the third installment in the hack-and-slash RPG series set in a medieval fantasy world.

One morning, after receiving a certificate from an elderly gentleman, proving you as a full-fledged guild member, you are sent to a small village in the Republic of Gringard. This is where the story begins. Various incidents occurring in the Republic, the conflicts with the neighboring Lindahl Empire, and the story of knights and dragons will eventually involve you in a grand destiny revolving around the stars.

▽ The basic systems of a replayable RPG such as intense real-time battles, rare item drops, and class changes are inherited from the previous game!

tr.description:
Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ；
你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。

你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。

「Card.Note」九大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.全局手势化
下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。

5.语音录入
打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

6.要事提醒：
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

7.快捷高效
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

8.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

9.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

pt.description:
A Era Espacial foi pura diversão, até que se tornou a Era Espacial Pós-apocalíptica.

Sua estação espacial está prestes a explodir, e você tem apenas 60 segundos antes de tudo ir para o espaço. O que (ou quem) você vai pegar antes da corrida até o transporte de emergência para começar sua jornada no DESCONHECIDO?

Este é 60 Parsecs!, uma aventura de ficção-científica na Era Atômico-espacial com um toque de humor negro, que inclui a paranoia da Guerra Fria, decoração cromada e baratas com capacetes espaciais.

Guie uma tripulação de astronautas extremamente despreparados, munidos com as porcarias, digo, ""suprimentos"" que você pôde pegar antes de se mandar, em uma aventura pelo cosmos sem eira nem beira. Dê seu melhor enquanto lida com escassez de sopa e outros horrores do espaço sideral. Será que você é capaz de achar um novo lar e sobreviver?

Boa viagem!

VASCULHE E EVACUE
Com apenas 60 segundos antes de as bombas nucleares reduzirem sua estação espacial a meras partículas no vácuo do espaço, pegue todos os suprimentos e tripulantes que conseguir antes da fuga. Nunca se sabe quando aquele fantoche de meia será útil.

SOBREVIVA E DECIDA
Funerais no espaço são inconvenientes, então tente evitar morrer. Use seus suprimentos limitados e sabedoria (abundante) para tomar decisões difíceis e garantir a sua sobrevivência, embora as suas chances não sejam muito boas.

EXPLORE E FABRIQUE
Fita adesiva conserta todos os problemas, mas como você consegue (ou pelo menos fabrica) fita adesiva? Planeje expedições para encontrar recursos, fabricar itens essenciais de sobrevivência e explorar novos mundos estranhos em uma aventura processual com morte permanente.

LIDERE E PROTEJA
Como comandante, é o seu dever manter a tripulação feliz; isso reduz as chances de eles matarem você. Gerencie os relacionamentos conforme eles se aproximam para que, com sorte, não joguem uns aos outros na eclusa de ar.

pt.description:
Dolores, Ted, Mary Jane e Timmy voltam a enfrentar o apocalipse nuclear nesta nova edição remasterizada da aventura atômica clássica 60 Seconds! Reatomized. O jogo agora inclui arte em alta resolução, gráficos 2D atualizados e texturas 3D feitas à mão, um novo menu interativo, interface melhorada, uma atualização técnica e, é claro... conteúdo novo!


NOVO MODO DE JOGO
Desafios de Sobrevivência - histórias curtas singulares que testam suas habilidades de sobrevivência!

NOVAS OPORTUNIDADES
para escapar da terra de ninguém em uma história que se ramifica por múltiplas trajetórias de jogo! Será que você consegue escapar em grande estilo?

NOVO SISTEMA DE RELACIONAMENTOS
mais histórias e interações malucas entre os membros da família McDoodle!

NOVOS EFEITOS SONOROS, ARTE E CONTEÚDO VISUAL DESBLOQUEÁVEL
permitindo deixar seu abrigo nuclear mais colorido!

NOVAS CONQUISTAS!

Restando apenas 60 segundos para o impacto final, saia em uma corrida louca pela casa em busca dos membros da família e de mantimentos úteis. Tudo estará contra você - o tempo, a mobília, a configuração da casa (que muda a cada partida) e ainda a pergunta fundamental: o que levar e o que deixar para trás?

Mas chegar a tempo ao abrigo nuclear é apenas o começo. O que e quem você salvou da explosão terão um papel vital na sua sobrevivência. Cada história será diferente, e cada dia haverá surpresas e eventos inesperados. Será que todas essas histórias terão um final feliz? Só depende de você. Racione água e comida, faça o melhor uso dos mantimentos, enfrente escolhas difíceis e até aventure-se na terra de ninguém.

Boa sorte.

pt.description:
O Genius Scan é um scanner de bolso. Digitalize rapidamente seus documentos em qualquer lugar e exporte-os como arquivos JPEG ou PDF de várias páginas.

*** Apple App of the Week *** mais de 20 milhões de usuários *** milhares de pequenas empresas ***

Posicione qualquer documento em frente à câmera do seu dispositivo: nosso aplicativo digitalizador reconhecerá o papel contra o fundo, cortará sua imagem e limpará o resultado. Você obterá uma digitalização nítida e legível. A digitalização em lote permite que você digitalize dezenas de páginas em apenas alguns segundos. Ferramentas poderosas ajudam a organizar, compartilhar ou arquivar seus documentos.

"Na próxima vez que você planejar viajar, não se esqueça de baixar uma cópia do Genius Scan para facilitar sua vida e a do departamento de contabilidade." - AppPicker.com

"Os aplicativos de câmera não foram projetados para digitalizar textos de perto, mas o Genius Scan sim." - The Guardian

== ENTERPRISE EDITION ==

Pacote Genius Scan+ Premium:

- Todos os recursos premium do Genius Scan+ (indicados com + abaixo), prontos para usar (sem necessidade de atualização).

Configuração gerenciada:

- Implantação em frotas de dispositivos por uma ferramenta MDM
- Definição prévia das configurações do aplicativo por usuário (por exemplo, definir endereço de email padrão, credenciais de WebDAV/FTP)
- Controle de quais aplicativos e serviços para os quais os usuários podem exportar documentos
- Sem anúncios

== PRINCIPAIS RECURSOS == 

Digitalização inteligente:

- Detecção de documento e remoção de fundo
- Correção de distorções
- Remoção de sombras e limpeza de imperfeição
- Filtros (preto e branco, quadro branco, foto)
- Digitalização em lote

Criação e edição de PDF:

- Mescla e divisão de documentos
- Criação de PDF multipáginas
- Importação de fotos e PDF

Segurança e privacidade:

- Processamento de documentos no dispositivo
+ Face ID
+ Criptografia de senha no PDF

Organização de documentos:

- Identificação de documentos
- Pesquisa de metadados e conteúdo
+ Esquemas personalizados de nomenclatura (Smart Document Names)
+ Backup e sincronização multidispositivos da Genius Cloud (assinatura em separado)

Exporta:

- Email
+ Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV.
+ Qualquer serviço compatível com WebDAV, como Citrix ShareFile, NextCloud, ownCloud, Synology, Yandex. 
+ Exportação automática de fundo

OCR (Reconhecimento de texto):

+ Extração de texto
+ Criação de PDFs pesquisáveis
+ Leitura de cartões de visita e criação de contatos

== QUEM SOMOS ==

É no coração de Paris, na França, que The Grizzly Labs desenvolve o Genius Scan. Nos orgulhamos por criarmos aplicativos que ajudam milhões de usuários em todo o mundo, e que nos colocam nos mais altos padrões de qualidade e privacidade. Entre em contato conosco @thegrizzlylabs se tiver alguma dúvida.

== PREÇOS E LEGAIS ==

Você pode se inscrever no Genius Cloud para backup e sincronização. Nesse caso, a loja da Genius Scan exibe a duração e o preço de cada assinatura, atualizados no momento da compra. O pagamento será cobrado na conta do iTunes quando o pedido for confirmado. As assinaturas são renovadas automaticamente, a menos que a renovação automática seja desativada até 24 horas antes do final do período atual. Gerenciar assinaturas, desative a renovação automática nas configurações da conta do iTunes.

https://www.thegrizzlylabs.com/genius-scan/cloud/terms

pt.description:
A morte não é o fim.

Jogue como um experimento de alquimia fracassado e explore o extenso castelo em constante mudança para descobrir o que aconteceu nesta ilha sombria ...!
Isto é, desde que você consiga passar pelos guardiões.

Dead Cells é um jogo de ação em plataforma em estilo roguevania que exige que você domine combates frenéticos 2D com uma grande variedade de armas e habilidades contra inimigos impiedosos.

Matar. Morrer. Aprender. Repetir.

Disponível inicialmente para PC e consoles, o sucesso indie Dead Cells agora está arrasando com os inimigos em dispositivos móveis!

Principais Características
• Roguevania: A exploração progressiva de um mundo interconectado, com a "rejogabilidade" do estilo rogue-lite e a adrenalina da ameaça de morte permanente

• Frenética Ação 2D: Aprenda os padrões de seus inimigos para se manter vivo ou prepare-se para ser enviado de volta à sua cela antes que possa dizer "baguete"

• Progressão Não Linear: Desbloqueie novos níveis a cada morte, opte pelo caminho que mais se adequar ao seu personagem atual, ao seu estilo de jogo ou simplesmente ao seu estado de espírito. Certamente as muralhas não vão ser tão perigosas quanto os esgotos, certo?

• Jogue no seu ritmo - Você vai explorar cada cantinho escuro do castelo, ou vai correr para o final?

*As últimas atualizações estão disponíveis: Clean Cut & The End is Near*

DLC RETORNO A CASTLEVANIA
É hora de caçar vampiros
• Novo enredo - vença o Soberano das Trevas ao lado de Alucard e Richter Belmont,
• 2 novos biomas - Explore o Castelo de Drácula e as suas redondezas
• 9 monstros novos - Lobisomens, armaduras assombradas e medusas esperam por você
• 14 armas novas - empunhe a Matadora de Vampiros ou a Água Benta para derrotar as criaturas da noite,
• 3 novos chefes - vá com unhas e dentes contra a Morte e o próprio Drácula
• 20 novas roupas - vista-se como seus personagens favoritos de Castlevania: Simon e Richter Belmont ou Alucard
• Trilhas sonoras alternativas - jogue ao som de 51 trilhas sonoras originais de Castlevania e 12 músicas reimaginadas no estilo de Dead Cells

AVISO: dispositivos com menos de 2 GB de RAM podem não conseguir rodar este conteúdo corretamente. Recomendamos não ficar com este DLC se o dispositivo estiver com menos de 2 GB de RAM.

Recriado cuidadosamente para dispositivos móveis com uma interface renovada
• Dois modos de jogo disponíveis: Original e Autoataque

• Controles personalizados e mais opções de controles de toque disponíveis: Troque a posição e o tamanho dos botões como preferir, deslize para esquivar...

• Suporte para controle externo MFi

•  Sem anúncios, sem mecânicas F2P!

Se encontrar um problema, entre em contato conosco pelo e-mail support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com e forneça o máximo de informação possível sobre o problema.

- CUSTOMIZÁVEL: permite adicionar medicamentos, procedimentos e ritmos da sua escolha, separados por categorias
- MÚLTIPLOS AJUSTES disponíveis para o Code Blue se adequar às suas preferências
- MODO FIRST RESPONDER: para aqueles que prestam primeiro atendimento em ambiente extra-hospitalar, opção para salvar as coordenadas dos atendimentos e visualizar no mapa interativa. 
- FLUXOGRAMAS: fluxogramas interativas com as recomendações presentes nos principais guidelines para RCP / PCR do AHA ACLS e ERC. 
- LOG/TIMELINE: resumo prontamente disponível em layout de fácil visualização acessível durante a ocorrência, permitindo manter total controle mesmo em uma PCR complexa de longa duração
- HISTÓRICO: histórico de atendimentos com resumo e indicadores de qualidade de assistência, permitindo revisão e aprimoramento dos atendimentos por equipes e seus gestores
- RELATÓRIO PDF: relatório em PDF com resumo e timeline completo

pt.description:
Dwarf Fortress is a famous fantasy world simulation/management game from Bay 12 Games. This app allows you to play Fortress Mode remotely on your mobile device.

Dwarf Fortress is an open-ended fantasy world simulation/management game from Bay 12 Games, which is in constant development since 2002. In Fortress mode, player indirectly controls a group of dwarves, attempting to construct a successful and wealthy fortress. The game features a highly detailed procedurally generated fantasy world with multiple civilizations and wildlife, realistic geology, weather effects. You will have dozens of different building and items to construct, hundreds of materials, advanced military system, agriculture, sieges and underground monsters, diplomacy and trading.

ATTENTION: Internet connection is required to play. The original game with a plugin (both free) running at your home or on a cloud server will be required, visit mifki.com/df/setup for details. Alternatively, you can purchase a server subscription from within the app, in which case we will manage a server for you, visit mifki.com/df/subscription for details.

Supported Dwarf Fortress version is 0.47.05.

Visit bay12games.com/dwarves for full information about Dwarf Fortress. However, please report any issues with this application to mifki.com/df/support and NOT to the original game authors.
